title: Assistant Marcom Manager
description:
• Assist Marketing & Communications team
  • Manage day to day marketing & promotion matters for restaurant outlets
  • Manage marketing & promotion campaigns for Catering & Event Sales
  • Responsible for the coordination and execution of marketing communications and advertising
  • Media relations and media monitoring
  • Manage presence in social media platforms, including Facebook, Instagram, etc
  • Plan and develop marketing materials with Restaurant Managers to generate sales leads
  • Work closely with copywriters and designers in producing marketing materials of visual impact and within brand guidelines
  • Copyedit, proof read and revise communication materials and menus
  • Handle customer feedback and respond promptly
  • Establish and maintain excellent public relations with external partners and stakeholders
  • Create marketing and promotional materials, both print and electronic
  • Work with Managers and Sales to determine budgets and manage expenses within allocated budget
  • Promote products and services through various marketing channels and public relations initiatives
  • Support operations team and perform operational duties whenever necessary
  • Provide support for special projects
  • Perform any other job tasks assigned by the management


Requirements:

  • Bachelor's degree in Marketing or related field
  • Minimum 2 years experience in similar role in Chinese restaurant
  • Knowledge in Microsoft Office is mandatory
  • Good knowledge of Marketing techniques and application
  • Creative skills in press ads, design and other marketing collaterals
  • Strong consumer and product awareness
  • Meticulous with an eye for details
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
  • Fluency in reading, writing and spoken English & Chinese / Mandarin – in order to liaise with Mandarin speaking associates
  • Team player who is also able to work independently
  • Able to multi-task and handle high volume of work in fast paced environment
  • Able and willing to work on weekends and PH when necessary

postedCompany.description: A Chinese restaurant that offers casual and fine dining experiences through dining and catering services. In order to create a culinary sanctuary where connoisseurs of traditional Cantonese cuisine can gather in celebration of exquisite dining and fine living, we are committed to delighting and satisfying our patrons with excellent service and delectable dishes. With over 10 years of continued growth and success, we are now seeking highly motivated professionals to join our dynamic team.
postedCompany.name: PEACH GARDEN PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
